# EchoMQ — BEAM-Native Polyglot Job Queue Backed by Redis

> Elixir job queue and scheduler with Redis backend, full wire compatibility with Node.js BullMQ and Go EchoMQ workers. v1.3.0, 20 modules, OTP-native with GenServer/Supervisor architecture. Supports priorities, retries, rate limiting, parent-child flows, cron scheduling, and distributed tracing.

Jobs are persisted in Redis using Lua scripts for atomic state transitions. The Elixir implementation shares Redis data structures and Lua scripts with the Node.js and Go implementations (the EchoMQ polyglot protocol), enabling cross-language job processing.

## Core
- [echomq.ex](lib/echomq.ex): Root module with `version/0` and `library_name/0`
- [queue.ex](lib/echomq/queue.ex): Job addition, queue state management, getters (counts, jobs, state)
- [worker.ex](lib/echomq/worker.ex): Job processing with configurable concurrency, event callbacks, graceful shutdown
- [job.ex](lib/echomq/job.ex): Job struct with data, state transitions (waiting/active/delayed/completed/failed)

## Configuration
- [types.ex](lib/echomq/types.ex): Shared type definitions and option specs
- [backoff.ex](lib/echomq/backoff.ex): Retry strategies (exponential, fixed, custom backoff)
- [keys.ex](lib/echomq/keys.ex): Redis key generation for queue namespacing

## Events and Scheduling
- [queue_events.ex](lib/echomq/queue_events.ex): Real-time job lifecycle event subscriptions via Redis Streams
- [telemetry.ex](lib/echomq/telemetry.ex): Built-in Telemetry integration for instrumentation
- [telemetry/behaviour.ex](lib/echomq/telemetry/behaviour.ex): Telemetry behaviour contract
- [telemetry/opentelemetry.ex](lib/echomq/telemetry/opentelemetry.ex): Optional OpenTelemetry distributed tracing
- [job_scheduler.ex](lib/echomq/job_scheduler.ex): Cron-based and interval-based recurring job creation

## Advanced
- [flow_producer.ex](lib/echomq/flow_producer.ex): Parent-child job flows with dependency tracking
- [stalled_checker.ex](lib/echomq/stalled_checker.ex): Automatic detection and recovery of stalled jobs
- [lock_manager.ex](lib/echomq/lock_manager.ex): Distributed lock management for worker coordination
- [cancellation_token.ex](lib/echomq/cancellation_token.ex): Job cancellation support
- [champ.ex](lib/echomq/champ.ex): CHAMP data structure integration for job storage

## Internal
- [scripts.ex](lib/echomq/scripts.ex): Redis Lua script loading and execution
- [redis_connection.ex](lib/echomq/redis_connection.ex): Redis connection pooling via NimblePool
- [version.ex](lib/echomq/version.ex): Version constant

## Related
- [echo_data](../echo_data/llms.txt): Upstream dependency for branded IDs and CHAMP data structures
- [codemojex](../codemojex/llms.txt): Primary consumer for game job processing
- [README.md](README.md): Full installation, usage examples, and API documentation
